capture_metadata.protocol: Connect-RPC over HTTP/2 (JSON encoding for unary probes)
notes: agentn is the global agent inference backend for Cursor CLI headless runs
System prompt + tool schemas are assembled server-side during RunSSE/Run; not returned by GetServerConfig
Observed input token budget ~69k-90k on trivial turns (includes cached harness + skills + rules)
GetServerConfig is served from api2.cursor.sh but includes agentUrlConfig pointing here

sections.title: Automatically find bugs
sections.description: Cursor will automatically kick off a cloud agent for every new git commit to identify critical bugs before they hit production.

sections.title: Get back safe fixes
sections.description: Always-on agents work silently in the background, share summary analyses in Slack, and produce PRs for safe fixes.

clientVersionStatus.message: This version of Cursor is no longer supported. Please update to continue.
